title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Byju's - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Byju's - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Curriculum Developer looking for your next big career move? Byju's in Kanpur offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Byju's:
Byju's is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Research Skills

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Byju's!
